name: notifications
description: Manage notifications — list all events, retrieve an event. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

parameters.name: templates
parameters.description: Array of template IDs or a single template ID

parameters.name: emails
parameters.description: Array of email addresses or a single email address

parameters.name: subscriberIds
parameters.description: Array of subscriber IDs or a single subscriber ID

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Array of severity levels or a single severity level

parameters.name: transactionId
parameters.description: The transaction ID to filter by

parameters.name: topicKey
parameters.description: Topic Key for filtering notifications by topic
